title: The Missing Piece: Functional Telomerase Restored in the Beetle Model
author: Fajkus, Petr

description:
Additional data to: 
 -covariance model searches  of type 3 snRNApromoter searches ( Infernal_snRNAs_for_promoter_analyses.xlsx)  
 -tblasn screening for TERT (all scripts, plots, queries, database specifications -  TERT_tblastn_supplement.zip )  
 -An optimized telomerase RNA (TR) covariance model with improved performance for TR detection across distant genomes -  cov_model_bascol3cacofoldR2R
